annotators.max_tokens: 2048 (14 long rows re-fetched at 4096-6144 to avoid reasoning-token truncation)

cache: outputs/iaa/raw/<dataset>/<model>/<row_id>.json (full raw API response per call; replays with no API)
independence: each annotator saw ONLY docs/annotation_codebook.md + the bare query; no gold labels, no registry-guard code, no tuned profiler prompt, no other annotators
